title: DoubleDoors Beta
description: A lightweight Paper plugin that makes adjacent doors open and close together, no redstone required.
body:
# DoubleDoors

DoubleDoors is a lightweight Paper plugin that makes adjacent doors open and close together, without needing redstone.

Status: Untested Preview  
This version has not been verified beyond basic local setup. It is being released to gather feedback and help test compatibility across different server setups.

## Features
- Automatically opens and closes adjacent doors of the same type
- Supports wooden and iron doors
- Handles top-half clicks and main-hand interactions
- Cancels vanilla interaction to prevent double toggling

## Compatibility
- Developed for Minecraft 1.21.8 (Paper)
- Not tested on earlier versions; use at your own risk

## Installation
1. Download the .jar file
2. Place it in your server's /plugins folder
3. Restart your server

## Feedback Welcome
If you try this plugin and run into issues, or if it works perfectly, I would appreciate hearing from you.  
Open an issue or contribute on GitHub: [github.com/Antecker/DoubleDoors](https://github.com/Antecker/DoubleDoors)

Created by Antecker  
Licensed under the MIT License
